---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DevLens
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Reminder: DevLens stays a single, dependency-free HTML file with no build
step and works fully without API keys. Please keep proposals within those
constraints (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What can't you do today, or what's painful?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Category

<!-- Mark all that apply with an x -->

- [ ] New analysis rule (security / bug / quality)
- [ ] New analysis engine or detector
- [ ] AI layer improvement
- [ ] Output mode / report / export
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Language support (e.g. Go, Ruby, PHP)
- [ ] Other

## Example

If this is a new rule or detector, paste a minimal code snippet that
*should* be flagged — and, if relevant, a similar one that should **not**:

```js
// should be flagged

```

```js
// should NOT be flagged (near miss)

```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or related issues.
